ActivityStory.101040201.2: In the midst of the Springseek Festival, you caught sight of a familiar figure on Cangwu's streets...
ActivityStory.101040202.2: You combed the streets of Cangwu for clues, soaking in the city's unique atmosphere.
ActivityStory.101040203.2: You obtained a key clue and pursued it further.
ActivityStory.101040204.2: Using bait, you lured the "culprit" out...
ActivityStory.101040205.2: Make it quick and clean. Capture them in one sweep.
ActivityStory.101040206.2: You learned the truth about your friends' disappearance.
ActivityStory.101040207.2: A subtle, unnatural shift is taking place inside the Monolith...
ActivityStory.101040208.2: This creature is not as vicious as imagined.
ActivityStory.101040209.2: Stop running! Getting a shot will help you, I promise!
ActivityStory.101040210.2: They just want to celebrate the New Year in peace.
ActivityStory.101050202.2: The story will only begin when you finally brave the cold night.
ActivityStory.101050203.2: Without light and fire, civilizations will crumble.
ActivityStory.101050204.2: What does it mean to miss home when you're already there?
ActivityStory.101050205.2: Some secrets are better left undisturbed...
ActivityStory.101050206.2: People say the darkest hour comes right before dawn.
ActivityStory.101050207.2: Ambition will not be buried by storms or time...
ActivityStory.101050208.2: Wild mountains howl as ancient beings begin to awaken...
ActivityStory.101050209.2: Load your courage and pull the trigger that heralds the daybreak.
ActivityStory.101050210.2: Resistance is the final act of defiance before defeat.
ActivityStory.101050211.2: With a raised weapon comes the burden of greater responsibility.
ActivityStory.101050212.2: The storm will pass, and the sun will rise again.
ActivityStory.101060201.2: We will make sure every mail reaches its recipient!
ActivityStory.101060202.2: Donna did such a great job, so how about a little bonus this time?
ActivityStory.101060203.2: Do you reckon ... this land stretches on forever?
ActivityStory.101060204.2: I usually mark every path I walk—that way, I never get lost!
ActivityStory.101060205.2: It's finally here ... after all this time.
ActivityStory.101060206.2: "In the treasure hunting business, it's finders keepers!"
ActivityStory.101060207.2: As for the rest of the reasoning, let's settle it with this weapon called "Reason's Edge" right here.
ActivityStory.101060208.2: "You mean we took that beating for nothing?"
ActivityStory.101060209.2: Besides the corn kernels, be sure to check out the trail markers I left behind!
ActivityStory.101060211.2: Across mountains and waters, it all begins with a letter. Through snow and storm, it's all for a single belief.
ActivityStory.101060212.2: Take a moment and etch the view of Port Bellin deep into your memory...
ActivityStory.201010201.2: The Snowish Festival is here. On the lively streets, you spot someone familiar...
ActivityStory.201010202.2: Dressed up in your costumes, you and Laru come to the kids who have been expecting their gifts...
ActivityStory.201010203.2: The Snowish Tree Spirit will always grant your wish.
ActivityStory.201010204.2: You decide to go and check out the Ashwind Clan...
ActivityStory.201010205.2: You decide to keep giving away gifts to the kids...
ActivityStory.201010206.2: You decide to follow the Messenger from the next block...
ActivityStory.201010207.2: You finally catch up to the mysterious Spirit.
ActivityStory.201010208.2: The tale about the Spirit turns out to be a melancholic memory.
ActivityStory.201010209.2: That day, Laru experienced something new—the magic of friendship...
ActivityStory.201010210.2: Looking at the fish in the water, she saw deep into her heart for the very first time.
ActivityStory.201010211.2: The celebration is at its climax. You and Laru really outdid yourselves today!
ActivityStory.201010212.2: To fulfill her wish, you make a rather daring decision...
ActivityStory.201010213.2: The Furnace's Delirium suddenly strikes. In order to "protect" Firefly, Laru steps forward...?
ActivityStory.201010214.2: The festival went well. Now, the time belongs to just the two of you...
